summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.agents; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.tools.FileTool; public class RepairAgent extends BaseAiAgent { public RepairAgent(eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.SessionContainer container) { super("Repair", "Repair", container); addTool(new FileTool()); } @Override protected String getAgentInstructions() { return "You are a specialized Code Repair Agent. Your goal is to identify and fix bugs, compilation errors, and configuration issues."; } }
